title: Nexus Select Trust is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Nexus Select Trust is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Nexus Select Trust in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
